title: Vishnu mantra
intro: Vishnu Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Vishnu.
description:
Om Namo Bhagavate Vasudevaya॥
Om, I bow to the Lord who dwells in the hearts of all beings (Lord Vishnu/Krishna).

faq.q1: When should Vishnu Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Vishnu Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning, evening, or on Thursdays.
faq.q2: How many times should Vishnu Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Vishnu Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Vishnu Mantra is believed to bring peace, protection, positive energy, and the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
faq.a4: Yes, anyone may chant Vishnu Mantra with faith and devotion.
faq.q5: Can Vishnu Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a5: Yes, Vishnu Mantra can be chanted daily with devotion.
